name: parrot
description: Hire a top-tier engineering team with deterministic guardrails: a builder/checker agent loop with selectable company profiles (Google, Meta, Palantir, Jane Street, NASA/JPL, Stripe), hook-enforced stop rules, and tamper-proof verification.

max_cycles.description: Builder dispatches per run before the loop hard-stops (default 5).

profile.description: Override the engineering profile for all projects (default: per-project .parrot/profile.json, falling back to google).

oracle_enabled.description: Ask a second-opinion model (codex/gemini CLI, if installed) at stall points and before GREEN.

best_of_n.description: Experimental: fork parallel builder candidates after repeated failed cycles.
